name: Vivek Rao
summary: Data Analyst with 2 years of experience turning complex datasets into actionable business intelligence for e-commerce and retail clients. Built dashboards consumed by 15+ C-suite stakeholders. Expert in SQL, Python, and Tableau. Tableau Certified Data Analyst. Reduced client reporting cycle from 5 days to 4 hours through automated pipelines. Passionate about storytelling with data.

education.institution: Osmania University College of Engineering, Hyderabad

experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Built end-to-end sales analytics pipeline using Python (Pandas, SQLAlchemy) + BigQuery + Tableau, reducing weekly reporting from 5 days to 4 hours for a top-5 FMCG client.
Designed 8 executive-level Tableau dashboards tracking ₹1,200 Crore in annual revenue across 22 product categories.
Performed customer segmentation (RFM + K-Means) on 2M+ transaction records, identifying 3 high-value segments worth ₹180 Crores combined.
Led an A/B testing program for a D2C brand — tested 6 marketing hypotheses, resulting in 23% increase in conversion rate.
Automated 14 recurring Excel reports with Python scripts, saving 18 man-hours per week across the team.
Mentored 2 junior analysts in SQL and Tableau fundamentals.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Created SQL-based weekly sales reports for a US retail client using MS SQL Server.
Developed Power BI dashboard for supply chain KPIs — on-time delivery, fill rate, inventory turnover.
Cleaned and transformed 500K+ row dataset from legacy ERP for migration.

spreadsheets: Advanced Excel (Macros, Power Query, Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/INDEX-MATCH)

projects.name: RetailPulse – Retail Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Open-source retail analytics starter kit with sample e-commerce dataset, Tableau workbook, and Python EDA notebook. 150+ GitHub stars. Used by 3 freelance data analysts.

projects.name: ChurnPredict – Customer Churn Analysis
projects.description: Built a customer churn prediction model with 89.4% accuracy. Feature engineering on 30+ behavioral variables. EDA published on Medium with 2,400 views.

certifications.name: Microsoft PL-300: Power BI Data Analyst

achievements: Promoted to Senior Analyst track after 18 months (youngest in team)
DataBridge Analytics Innovation Award — Q2 2023 (for automated reporting pipeline)
Medium Data Science Author — 8,000+ total views on analytics articles
Osmania University Topper — Statistics & Data Mining (2022)
